data.description_suggestion: Creates a new workflow in the integration project. Accepts workflow configuration including name, description, and initial flow definition via WorkflowInput schema. data.summary_suggestion: Update workflow configuration and definition
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing workflow identified by workflowUid. Accepts workflow configuration changes via WorkflowInput schema including name, description, and flow definition. Returns the updated workflow object. Note: Deployed workflows may require redeployment after updates. Supports partial updates. Requires bearer token authentication.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete a workflow permanently
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a workflow identified by workflowUid. Removes all workflow configuration and associated metadata. Deployed workflows must be undeployed before deletion. Returns HTTP 204 No Content on success. This action cannot be undone. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical information about side effects and prerequisites. Enhanced version clarifies the permanent nature, undeployment requirement, response code, and authentication to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Trigger workflow execution with input data
data.description_suggestion: Triggers execution of a deployed workflow identified by workflowUid. Accepts input data required by the workflow through the request body. Returns an execution record with execution UID, status, and timestamp. The workflow must be deployed before execution. Execution is asynchronous - returns immediately with execution tracking information. Requires bearer token authentication.
